notes: Combined rows are computed by adding Table 9-3 NG1 components and Table 9-1 NG2 components.
Indigenous production is only counted inside the NG1 grid.
Physical LNG imports are shown separately; grid supply uses NG1 LNG adjustment plus NG2 marketable gas.
Residual equals total supply minus transformation plus final consumption; no statistical difference is invented.

sourceMap.balanceUse: Combined Taiwan grid gas supply and demand
sourceMap.source: Taiwan Ministry of Economic Affairs, Energy Administration monthly energy statistics
sourceMap.pull: Monthly open-data CSV set_id=135. Table 9-1 fields cover NG2 regasified LNG; Table 9-3 fields cover NG1 indigenous gas plus LNG calorific-value adjustment.
Norwegian maintenance/outage notices. Useful for Europe/Norway context, not Taiwan gas balance.
